revision.comment: fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.comment: restored discussion information in a less obtrusive way. otherwise, it is not known that there is discussion or where that discussion is taking place
less obstrusive form. most people who read articles are _readers_. the discussion is targetting the very small minority of _editors_ while confusing the more important people.
moved notice to not get in the way of existing words following any templates, change link direction
Don't scatter a weird D around hundreds of articles!
Created darker background as per vote: DO NOT RV

revision.comment: Trim some bits from this template as it is transcluded hundreds of times on some pages and should be as little as possible.
per edit request at [[Template talk:Yes#Template-protected edit request on 7 January 2022]] - slightly lighten for accessibility
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors. Provide explicit text color for night mode.
replacing unicode character (which seems to not appear correctly in some systems) with tiny image

revision.comment: restored discussion information in a less obtrusive way. otherwise, it is not known that there is discussion or where that discussion is taking place
less obstrusive form. most people who read articles are _readers_. the discussion is targetting the very small minority of _editors_ while confusing the more important people.
moved notice to not get in the way of existing words following any templates, change link direction
Don't scatter a weird D around hundreds of articles!
Created darker background as per vote: DO NOT RV

revision.comment: Trim some bits from this template as it is transcluded hundreds of times on some pages and should be as little as possible.
per edit request at [[Template talk:Yes#Template-protected edit request on 7 January 2022]] - slightly lighten for accessibility
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors. Provide explicit text color for night mode.
replacing unicode character (which seems to not appear correctly in some systems) with tiny image
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Firebug|Firebug]] to last version by Radiant!

revision.comment: restored discussion information in a less obtrusive way. otherwise, it is not known that there is discussion or where that discussion is taking place
less obstrusive form. most people who read articles are _readers_. the discussion is targetting the very small minority of _editors_ while confusing the more important people.
moved notice to not get in the way of existing words following any templates, change link direction
removing "discuss" bit, as this is affecting all articles!!
Don't scatter a weird D around hundreds of articles!
Created darker background as per vote: DO NOT RV

revision.comment: restored discussion information in a less obtrusive way. otherwise, it is not known that there is discussion or where that discussion is taking place
less obstrusive form. most people who read articles are _readers_. the discussion is targetting the very small minority of _editors_ while confusing the more important people.
moved notice to not get in the way of existing words following any templates, change link direction
removing "discuss" bit, as this is affecting all articles!!
Don't scatter a weird D around hundreds of articles!
Created darker background as per vote: DO NOT RV

revision.comment: Trim some bits from this template as it is transcluded hundreds of times on some pages and should be as little as possible.
per edit request at [[Template talk:Yes#Template-protected edit request on 7 January 2022]] - slightly lighten for accessibility
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors. Provide explicit text color for night mode.
replacing unicode character (which seems to not appear correctly in some systems) with tiny image
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Firebug|Firebug]] to last version by Radiant!

revision.comment: restored discussion information in a less obtrusive way. otherwise, it is not known that there is discussion or where that discussion is taking place
less obstrusive form. most people who read articles are _readers_. the discussion is targetting the very small minority of _editors_ while confusing the more important people.
moved notice to not get in the way of existing words following any templates, change link direction
Don't scatter a weird D around hundreds of articles!
Created darker background as per vote: DO NOT RV
